plants.name: Apple
plants.species: Malus domestica — a deciduous tree in the Rosaceae family producing crisp, sweet to tart fruits.

plants.name: Bell pepper
plants.species: Capsicum annuum — a cultivar producing sweet, mild, bell-shaped fruits in red, yellow, or green.

plants.name: Blueberry
plants.species: Vaccinium corymbosum — a perennial shrub bearing clusters of blue-purple berries rich in antioxidants.

plants.name: Cherry
plants.species: Prunus avium — a stone fruit tree producing small, round, sweet to sour drupes.

plants.name: Corn
plants.species: Zea mays — a tall annual cereal crop producing edible kernels arranged on a cob.

plants.name: Grape
plants.species: Vitis vinifera — a woody climbing vine bearing clusters of juicy berries used fresh or for wine.

plants.name: Peach
plants.species: Prunus persica — a deciduous tree bearing fuzzy-skinned, sweet stone fruits with yellow-white flesh.

plants.name: Potato
plants.species: Solanum tuberosum — a starchy tuberous crop, one of the world's most widely consumed vegetables.

plants.name: Raspberry
plants.species: Rubus idaeus — a perennial shrub bearing red aggregate fruits composed of small drupelets.

plants.name: Soyabean
plants.species: Glycine max — a legume rich in protein and oil, widely cultivated for food and industrial use.

plants.name: Squash
plants.species: Cucurbita pepo — a cucurbit vine bearing fleshy fruits in varied shapes, sizes, and colors.

plants.name: Strawberry
plants.species: Fragaria x ananassa — a low-growing plant bearing sweet, red aggregate accessory fruits.

plants.name: Tomato
plants.species: Solanum lycopersicum — a fruiting plant in the nightshade family bearing red to yellow fleshy berries.
